currency.description: Ad account currency code the spend value is denominated in

date.description: Spend date in the ad account's timezone

supplier_ad_account_id.description: Reference to the SupplierAdAccount association this row was imported through.

supplier_id.description: Reference to the Supplier this spend is attributed to, resolved from SupplierAdAccount at sync time. Primary attribution key.

supplier_key.description: lowercased trimmed supplier_name, used to join spend to leads case-insensitively

video_3s_views.description: Meta video_play_actions (3 second views). Ad level only. Thumbstop rate is this divided by impressions.

video_thruplays.description: Meta video_thruplay_watched_actions. Ad level only. Hold rate is this divided by impressions.
